Quads.Title: Quads
Quads.Description: Welcome to 4v4, revamped! New, larger, Rocket Labs-inspired Arenas give more space to play. The Boost layout on these Arenas has been optimized for the extra length and width of the field. Be sure to grab the new wall-mounted Boosts to keep up the attacking pressure or when rotating back to defend!

RankedQuads.Title: Quads
RankedQuads.Description: Welcome to 4v4, revamped! New, larger, Rocket Labs-inspired Arenas give more space to play. The Boost layout on these Arenas has been optimized for the extra length and width of the field. Be sure to grab the new wall-mounted Boosts to keep up the attacking pressure or when rotating back to defend!

RankedHeatseekerDoubles.Title: Heatseeker
RankedHeatseekerDoubles.Description: Heatseeker is now 2v2! Touching the ball automatically sends it in the direction of the opposing team’s goal. It fires back toward your goal if it hits the backboard, so be careful! The ball gains speed with each touch. Scoring 7 goals wins!

HauntedBall.Title: Ghost Hunt
HauntedBall.Description: Use your car's Proton Pack to ensnare the ball and carry it to the opposing team's Containment Zone. A point is scored if the ball remains in the Containment Zone for two seconds. Score more than the opposing team before time runs out.

BeachBall.Title: Beach Ball
BeachBall.Description: The ball is lighter and curves just like a beach ball in this 2v2 mode. Enjoy the sun of Salty Shores and have fun!

Rugby.Title: Spike Rush
Rugby.Description: All players have Spikes which automatically engage after kickoff, allowing them to stick the ball to their car by driving into it. The ball carrier cannot use or collect boost, is easily demolished by opposing players, and can manually disengage their car's spikes to release the ball. Score by getting the ball into your opponent’s goal by any means.

GodBall.Title: Heatseeker
GodBall.Description: Touching the ball automatically sends it in the direction of the opposing team's goal in this speedy game of 3v3.  It fires back toward your goal if it hits the backboard, so be careful! The ball gains speed with each touch. Scoring 7 goals wins!

GodBallSpooky.Title: Haunted Heatseeker
GodBallSpooky.Description: Heatseeker is now 2v2! Touching the ball automatically sends it in the direction of the opposing team’s goal. It fires back toward your goal if it hits the backboard, so be careful! The ball gains speed with each touch. Scoring 7 goals wins!

GodBallRicochet.Title: Heatseeker Ricochet
GodBallRicochet.Description: Heatseeker with a fun twist thanks to three unique Rocket Labs Arenas: Barricade, Colossus, and Hourglass. Touching the ball automatically sends it in the direction of the opposing team's goal. The ball gains speed with each touch. Scoring 7 goals wins!

GodBallHaunted.Title: Haunted Heatseeker
GodBallHaunted.Description: The spooky side of Heatseeker! Touching the ball automatically sends it in the direction of the opposing team's goal. It fires back toward your goal if it hits the backboard, so be careful! The ball gains speed with each touch. Scoring 7 goals wins!

GodBallDoubles.Title: Heatseeker
GodBallDoubles.Description: Heatseeker is now 2v2! Touching the ball automatically sends it in the direction of the opposing team’s goal. It fires back toward your goal if it hits the backboard, so be careful! The ball gains speed with each touch. Scoring 7 goals wins!

RumShot.Title: Dropshot Rumble
RumShot.Description: Dropshot and Rumble have collided! Get ready to break your opponents' floor, but now with the power-ups of Rumble!

RumShotDoubles.Title: Dropshot Rumble
RumShotDoubles.Description: Dropshot and Rumble have collided! Get ready to break your opponents' floor, but now with the power-ups of Rumble!

BoomerBall.Title: Boomer Ball
BoomerBall.Description: Feel the boom in this twist on classic 3v3 Soccar! Ball speed and bounciness are increased. Boost is more powerful and unlimited. Touch the ball and watch it ricochet around the arena!

SpecialSnowDay.Title: Winter Breakaway
SpecialSnowDay.Description: Drop the puck and face off on snowy Throwback Stadium! Just like Snow Day, the ball has been replaced with a hockey puck in this 3v3 limited time mode.

Football.Title: Gridiron
Football.Description:
Huddle up and learn the rules of Gridiron:
- The standard Rocket League ball has been replaced with an American football in this 4v4 mode.
- Touching the ball attaches it to the roof of your car. Handoff to a teammate or pass it downfield by dodging. Double jumping drops the ball.
- Goals scored while the ball is attached are worth 7 points. Goals that are passed in or loose balls that score are worth 3 points. All own-goals are also worth 3 points.
- Stay in bounds! You'll fumble the ball if you cross the line marked on the Arena wall.
 Now hit the Gridiron and have fun!

Cubic.Title: Super Cube
Cubic.Description: Square up for 3v3 Super Cube! The ball has been replaced with a Cube with increased maximum speed and bounciness. Think fast!

CubicSpooky.Title: Spooky Cube
CubicSpooky.Description: Ready to smash some pumpkins? Spooky Cube will put your reflexes to the test as this jack-o'-lantern cube ricochets around Farmstead (Spooky) Arena. With a mess of mutators increasing max speed and bounciness, you’ll need a lot of luck chasing this pumpkin down!

TacticalRumble.Title: Tactical Rumble
TacticalRumble.Description: Rumble has evolved! Instead of getting one random power-up, players will receive three to choose from. When one is used, three new power-ups will appear following a cooldown. Some power-ups have a longer cooldown than others, so choose wisely!

SpringLoaded.Title: Spring Loaded
SpringLoaded.Description: Spring into this 3v3 Rumble variant where power-ups have been replaced by the Haymaker and Boot. Boot your opponents and punch your ticket to victory!

SpeedDemon.Title: Speed Demon
SpeedDemon.Description: Put the pedal to the metal in this 3v3, lightning-quick variant of Boomer Ball. Boost is unlimited and double the power. The ball is larger and moves at super fast speed, but with less bounciness. Demolitions occur on contact, but a 1-second respawn timer gets you right back into the action.

RumbleBM.Title: Gotham City Rumble
RumbleBM.Description: Gotham City's Super-Villains have taken over Rumble! All power-ups in Gotham City Rumble are themed after Batman and his Rogues Gallery. Hit Beckwith Park (Gotham Night) in this epic showdown between good and evil!

Knockout.Title: Knockout
Knockout.Description: In this destructive derby, only the strong survive. 3 lives each, and the last car standing wins! Attack: Dodge into your opponents to send them flying. Block: Backward dodge to reflect damage back at attacking players. Grab: Hold GP_LTrigger while dodging to Grab an opponent. Dodge again to throw.

ThirdWheel.Title: confidential_thirdwheel_test
ThirdWheel.Description: Devin will fill this in later. Try to make 3 wheels sound like a good thing.

MagnusFutball.Title: Nike FC Showdown
MagnusFutball.Description: Football meets Soccar in a Nike-Branded Arena! Nike FC Showdown uses a new Nike Ball that curves through the air with modified Mutator Settings. Higher max speed and low bounce mean that this LTM is best played fast and close to the ground.

GForceFrenzy.Title: G-Force Frenzy
GForceFrenzy.Description: In this new Limited Time Mode you will battle 3x3 in low gravity, plus use an added unlimited boost, 5x its usual power, to send you hurtling through the air. Reckon you’re up to the task, pilot?

Territory.Title: Split Shot
Territory.Description: Welcome to Split Shot! Here, the goal is to score with a lighter ball without touching your opponent’s side of the field. While you are divided by a wall, you are still able to jump, fly, and dodge through it. But beware! Touching any surface on your opponent’s half will result in an instant demo. It still may be worth the risk to make a game-changing play.

TerritoryDoubles.Title: Split Shot Doubles
TerritoryDoubles.Description: Welcome to Split Shot! Here, the goal is to score with a lighter ball without touching your opponent’s side of the field. While you are divided by a wall, you are still able to jump, fly, and dodge through it. But beware! Touching any surface on your opponent’s half will result in an instant demo. It still may be worth the risk to make a game-changing play.

GodballTerritory.Title: Split Shot Heatseeker
GodballTerritory.Description: The Split Shot wall has been added to Heatseeker to shake up the gameplay! You’ll be able to jump, fly, and dodge through the wall, but touching any surface on your opponent’s half will result in an instant demo. It still may be worth the risk to make a game-changing play. Like standard Heatseeker, touching the ball automatically sends it in the direction of the opposing team’s goal. The ball gains speed with each touch and the first to score 7 goals wins!

GodballTerritoryDoubles.Title: Split Shot Heatseeker Doubles
GodballTerritoryDoubles.Description: The Split Shot wall has been added to Heatseeker to shake up the gameplay! You’ll be able to jump, fly, and dodge through the wall, but touching any surface on your opponent’s half will result in an instant demo. It still may be worth the risk to make a game-changing play. Like standard Heatseeker, touching the ball automatically sends it in the direction of the opposing team’s goal. The ball gains speed with each touch and the first to score 7 goals wins!

NonStandardSoccar.Title: Non-Standard Soccar
NonStandardSoccar.Description: Soccar featuring a wide variety of Arenas!

NonStandardSoccarDoubles.Title: Non-Standard Soccar Doubles
NonStandardSoccarDoubles.Description: Soccar featuring a wide variety of Arenas!

SnowdayTerritory.Title: Split Shot Snow Day
SnowdayTerritory.Description: The Split Shot wall has been added to Snow Day to shake up the gameplay! You'll be able to jump, fly, and dodge through the wall, but touching any surface on your opponent's half will result in an instant demo. It still may be worth the risk to make a game-changing play. In this mode, the Snow Day puck is lighter and easier to send across the field!

CarWars.Title: Spike Drop
CarWars.Description: All players have Spikes which automatically engage after kickoff, allowing them to stick the ball to their car by driving into it. The ball carrier cannot use or collect boost, is easily demolished by opposing players, and can manually disengage their Spikes to release the ball. Drop the ball into the hole to score!

PizzaParty.Title: Pizza Party
PizzaParty.Description: Join a team of 4 friends to push the pizza into the goal! The twist? No jumping! Use your grappling hook ninja skills to get to the pizza instead!

PushThePuck.Title: Push The Puck
PushThePuck.Description: Join a team of 4 friends to push the puck into the goal! The twist? No jumping! Use your grappling hook skills to get to the puck instead!

Possession.Title: Possession Rumble
Possession.Description: Take control of the ball in Possession Rumble! The longer the ball stays your team's color, the more points your team earns. Choose from three rumble power-ups to take possession or thwart your opponents. Some power-ups have a longer cooldown than others, so choose wisely!

FCShowdown.Title: Adidas Soccar Strike
FCShowdown.Description: Football meets Soccar! Adidas Soccer Strike uses the official Adidas Clubs World Cup Ball that curves smoothly through the air. Hit the left side of the ball to curve right and the right side of the ball to curve left. Reduced ball bounciness and increased ball gravity means you'll need teamwork in this mode to succeed, just like the beautiful game!

Sacrifice.Title: Demolition Duel
Sacrifice.Description: Brought to you by our community's own SunlessKhan, Demolition Duel is a version of Soccar with an explosive twist! All players instantly demolish on contact with the ball, so make those hits count!

JumpJam.Title: Jump Jam
JumpJam.Description: Soccar with unlimited jumps and dodges.

SonicRush.Title: Sonic Spin
SonicRush.Description:
Can you keep up with Sonic the Hedgehog?
He’s the fastest thing alive, and if you head over to Sonic Spin, you can try your luck against the blue blur himself. Do you have what it takes to match his speed? Why not bring a few friends? But watch out as Sonic is here to disrupt the field while you play. Make sure to stay out of his way or you could lose all your rings!
Go fast enough, and you could even score a goal before he has time to get into the arena!

UpToNoGood.Title: Up To No Good
UpToNoGood.Description: Pop it up and knock it down! Launch the ball above the fog to get started. The longer it is up, the more it is worth! Earn points when the ball touches the ground with your team’s color.

ProjectAIM.Title: FREE AERIALS *not clickbait*
ProjectAIM.Description:
[DEV ONLY] This lets you fly right at the ball when you boost in the air.  This is for developers only so we don't have to hear "develop some skills" when we use our dev tags.

We're getting out of Gold with this one!

ActiveEvents.Subtitle: BUILT DIFFERENT
ActiveEvents.Description: This is your proving ground. Complete challenges, take on your biggest rivals, and unlock rewards all season long.

ActiveEvents.Subtitle: Rivals & Rockets
ActiveEvents.Description: Friendly competition is expanding beyond the pitch with the new Rivals and Rockets event! Complete Quests and Challenges in both Fortnite and Rocket League to earn rewards, including the Havoc vehicle and the Dueling Dragons Jackie Outfit.

ActiveEvents.Subtitle: Flow State
ActiveEvents.Description: Time to genuinely reach your flow state.

ActiveEvents.Subtitle: Apex Overdrive LTE
ActiveEvents.Description: Jump into Apex Overdrive. Complete Challenges to earn up to 13 painted variants of the Apex Wheels!

Titles.Text: The KickOff - Middle East Grand Finalist

• After winning a match Bumblebee converts into Robot mode on the Post-Game Spotlight screen.

  • Bumblebee will randomly select and perform one of three winning animations.

  • Earning MVP has a chance to perform a rare fourth animation!
Bumblebee vehicle does not convert during gameplay. Vehicle will convert into Robot mode and play a random Post-Game Spotlight animation upon winning a match. Robot mode is not controllable.
Lightning McQueen reacts to speed, narrowing his eyes with intensity as he accelerates.
The incident is being reviewed for disciplinary action. You will receive feedback of any action taken as a result. Thank you for taking the time to keep the League friendly!}

("if u miss, it was a fake.","boost is stored in the ego.","the ball cannot legally hurt u unless u look at it.","free play is where cars go to repent.","saving a replay preserves the crime scene.","if kickoff goes badly blame region selection.","a clean landing is just falling with confidence.","the handbrake is not a button, it is a lifestyle.","your teammate is also wondering what the fuck u are doing.","rotate midair to confuse the ball.","if the server lags, it is thinking.","do not trust the small pads. they know too much.","every missed open net becomes a historical document.","the octane has seen everything and forgiven nothing.","when in doubt, jump for absolutely no reason.")
